summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 29 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 97 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 47 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 27 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 38 days past due with 29 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **25 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $12,820 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 26 days past due with 17 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $52,105 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 16 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **22 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $13,594 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 10 days past due with 14 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **28 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 9 days past due with 10 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **23 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** The oldest overdue task is 8 days past due with 7 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $55,167 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 4 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

260 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **132 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 40 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$89,933 in payments going out this week** across 47 tasks — make sure funds are available. $58,533 expected in from 4 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) and Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 11. Keep the momentum going.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 10 overdue (oldest: 9d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **23 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 55 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 7 overdue (oldest: 8d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **14 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 53 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 4 overdue (oldest: 7d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **7 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 7. Keep the momentum going.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 29 overdue (oldest: 38d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **25 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 34 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 2 payment tasks need Operations attention.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.

**Ginger Brown:** 17 overdue (oldest: 26d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **13 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 29 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 16 overdue (oldest: 7d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **22 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 30 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
